title: Galaxy Buds Core Black Sm R410Nzkamea
features: Comfy fit for sound that hits

Designed for all-day comfort, Galaxy Buds Core features silicone wingtips for a pressure-free fit. Whether you're relaxing at home or jogging around the park, Galaxy Buds Core stays in place while feeling light and comfortable.
Controlling your playlist just got easier. Simply connect your earbuds, keep your smartphone in your pocket and pause your favorite song with a single tap. Then, play on by using the same gesture.
Enjoy carefully crafted sound with clear trebles and a deep, well-tuned bass that stays true to the beat.
Tune in to your world, tune out the rest
Kick back and let your music take center stage. Active Noise cancellation reduces unnecessary noise — creating a quiet space to listen to the latest hits or to your favorite podcasts.
Hear and be heard with crisp, clear calls wherever you go. The 3 microphones work in unison to capture your voice with precision, ensuring your words can be heard crystal clear.
With 35 hours of play time, your life soundtrack is ready to play whenever you are.

specifications.Sensors: Hall Sensor, Proximity Sensor, Touch Sensor
specifications.Speaker: 1-way
